articles.title_en: The head of RTK-DPC described the data center market in the Russian Federation as “deficient concentration”
articles.lead_en: Among the limitations, David Martirosov listed, are a shortage of electricity in key locations, return on investment in 7-10 years, high cost of borrowed capital

articles.title_en: Russian online marketplaces lost up to 10% of users after blocking VPN access
articles.lead_en: Russian online marketplaces saw user activity and sales decline after they began blocking VPN users in April, the Russian business daily Kommersant reported, citing a study by Digital Budget.

articles.title_en: Moscow court orders Belgian depositary Euroclear to pay massive damages to Russia’s Central Bank
articles.lead_en: A Moscow arbitration court has ordered the Belgian depositary Euroclear to pay 18.17 trillion rubles (200 billion euros) in damages, fully granting Russia’s central bank’s claim, Sergei Savelyev, a representative of the defendant, told the Russian business outlet RBC.

articles.title_en: Rosstat preliminary estimated the decline in Russian GDP in the first quarter at 0.2%
articles.lead_en: The Bank of Russia previously estimated the decline in the country's GDP in the same period in annual terms at 0.5%
